Off Calendar Feb-21-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-21-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Nici Ronich.
Jak Marquez, Esq. for Plaintiff: Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corp.
Plaintiff's Witness: Paul Taylor, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Donald Rose.
EXH. 1 - Rental Agreement-------------------ID/EVID.
EXH. 2 - Three Day Notice-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of Property located at 55 Mason St., #403, San Francisco.
Forfeiture of the Rental Agreement.
Back Rent and Damages $1,161.12
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits in open court.
Counsel to prepare Judgment.

11:30 P.M.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-14-2006 Continued To Feb-21-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL

MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Irene Burns.
Jak Marquez, Esq., for Plaintiff: Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corp.
Plaintiff's Witness: Gabnriele Desmond, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Donald Rose.
Exhibit 1 - 12 Page Complaint by tenants-------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Three-Days Notice------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff for possession of premises located at 55 Mason St., #403, San Francisco, Forfeiture of the rental agreement, Holdover Damages of $586.40.
Plaintiff stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.
